raw_consumer_statement:
I noticed charges on my American Express Gold card that I didnt recognize. I called the American Express and told them that I didnt make the purchase at XXXX for {$180.00}. The fraud took place in XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/year>. 
Three purchases were made with my American Express Gold card. The two first ones they approved as fraud but not the third one. I dont live in XXXX  and I have never been in XXXX XXXX
